DELETE /assets.description: Deletes multiple assets at the same time.

DELETE /tags/{id}.description: Delete a specific tag by its ID.

GET /api-keys/me.description: Retrieve the API key that is used to access this endpoint.

GET /assets/statistics.description: Retrieve various statistics about the assets owned by the authenticated user.

GET /assets/{id}.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific asset.

GET /server/version.description: Retrieve the current server version in semantic versioning (semver) format.

GET /sync/ack.description: Retrieve the synchronization acknowledgments for the current session.

GET /tags.description: Retrieve a list of all tags.

GET /users/me.description: Retrieve information about the user making the API request.

POST /auth/login.description: Login with username and password and receive a session token.

POST /auth/logout.description: Logout the current user and invalidate the session token.

POST /search/metadata.description: Search for assets based on various metadata criteria.

POST /sync/ack.description: Send a list of synchronization acknowledgements to confirm that the latest changes have been received.

POST /sync/stream.description: Retrieve a JSON lines streamed response of changes for synchronization. This endpoint is used by the mobile app to efficiently stay up to date with changes.

POST /tags.description: Create a new tag by providing a name and optional color.

POST /trash/restore/assets.description: Restore specific assets from the trash.

PUT /tags/assets.description: Add multiple tags to multiple assets in a single request.

force.description: Force delete even if in use

createdAt.description: The UTC timestamp when the asset was originally uploaded to Immich.

duration.description: Video/gif duration in hh:mm:ss.SSS format (null for static images)

fileCreatedAt.description: The actual UTC timestamp when the file was created/captured, preserving timezone information. This is the authoritative timestamp for chronological sorting within timeline groups. Combined with timezone data, this can be used to determine the exact moment the photo was taken.

fileModifiedAt.description: The UTC timestamp when the file was last modified on the filesystem. This reflects the last time the physical file was changed, which may be different from when the photo was originally taken.

localDateTime.description: The local date and time when the photo/video was taken, derived from EXIF metadata. This represents the photographer's local time regardless of timezone, stored as a timezone-agnostic timestamp. Used for timeline grouping by "local" days and months.

thumbhash.description: Thumbhash for thumbnail generation (base64) also used as the c query param for thumbnail cache busting.

updatedAt.description: The UTC timestamp when the asset record was last updated in the database. This is automatically maintained by the database and reflects when any field in the asset was last modified.

encodedVideoPath.description: Filter by encoded video file path

isNotInAlbum.description: Filter assets not in any album

rating.description: Filter by rating [1-5], or null for unrated

x-immich-history.description: Using -1 as a rating is deprecated and will be removed in the next major version.

count.description: Number of albums in this page
Number of assets in this page
Number of assets with this facet value

types.description: Sync entity types to delete acks for

shouldChangePassword.description: Require password change on next login
